title: Latest Micron timeline: See what’s next in Upstate NY as concrete work continues
summary: Micron Technology's chipmaking complex in Clay, NY is advancing into active construction phase following three+ years of planning and study. This major economic development project represents significant infrastructure investment and workforce opportunity for the region.
